subject: a humanoid figure with voluminous dark dreadlocks surging forward in a battle charge through a jungle, mouth open in a war cry, debris scattering in all directions
description: The figure lunges forward out of a dense jungle canopy, propelled by explosive momentum. The hair — a mass of thick dark dreadlocks — fans outward and upward in every direction, shards of bark, leaves, and plant debris caught in the burst. The figure's mouth is wide open in a raw scream or battle cry. The torso is minimally clothed, with dark spiked arm and shoulder ornamentation visible. The hands and arms extend forward and to the sides, empty or gripping something not clearly resolved. Behind and around the figure, golden-green light blazes through the leaf canopy, creating extreme backlit contrast. The palette is warm gold, amber, and deep green with dark silhouetted debris. The overall effect is pure kinetic force — nature unleashed through a living weapon.
foreground: figure with dreadlocks mid-charge, debris and leaves scattering outward
background: jungle canopy with blinding backlit golden-green light
emotion: fury and exhilaration — mouth open in a war cry, wild forward momentum
